chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1778 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15584/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 15585/16 4. For Katcha Peshi. 5. For orders on M.A 15586/16 01.11.2016. Mr. Ali Asghar Chang, Advocate for petitioners alongwith Petitioners. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. It is, inter alia, contended by the Counsel for petitioners that petitioner No.1 Mst. Nazeeran being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and in this regard affidavit of freewill sworn by petitioner No.1 and nikahnama of both the petitioners are available on record as Annexure-A/15 & B/19. The Counsel states that due to this marriage, private respondents No.3 to 5, who are immediate family members of lady petitioner, are unhappy and there is every likelihood that they may take law in their hands and cause serious harm to the petitioners unless restrained by this Court. Issue notices to the private respondents through all modes except publication as well as notice to official respondents and A.A.G for a date to be fixed by the office after two weeks. In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioners and official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if petitioners approach the official respondents for protection, the same should be provided to them in accordance with law. JUDGE
